scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.app: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm --prefix app run dev
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm --prefix app run dist
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm --prefix app run dist:mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm --prefix app run dist:linux
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm --prefix app run dist:win
